name: Quick Turkey & Sausage Paella
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Turkey cutlets - sliced into 1/2-inch strips
3/4 lb Chorizo or other sausage - sliced into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 3-quart Dutch oven.
2. Add turkey cutlets and sauté until lightly browned, about 4 minutes.
3. Add sausage and sauté until lightly browned.
4. Add onions, chilies, thyme, and bay leaf; cook over low heat until onions soften, about 5 minutes.
5. Add bell pepper and rice, stirring to coat with oil.
6. Add white wine, chicken stock, Italian tomatoes, saffron, salt, and pepper.
7. Bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until rice is tender (18-20 minutes).
9. Remove from heat; stir in peas.
10. Cover and let stand for 2 minutes before adjusting seasonings and serving immediately.
